column1: # I keep the header names in lowercase with spaces as underscores. This is mainly for better readability and consistency with sql conventions.
-- Which city has more experienced employees?
SUM(CASE WHEN experience >= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS experienced,
ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN experience >= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS experienced_percentage
